name: Seamless.AI

auth.notes: REST supports API keys in the Token header and OAuth 2.0 Bearer tokens. MCP uses https://mcp.seamless.ai/mcp with OAuth 2.1; access must be enabled on the account.

rateLimits: Default REST limit is 60 requests per minute per endpoint at the organization level; X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset, and X-PublicAPI-Credits headers expose the active limits/credits. OAuth routes and custom accounts may differ.
pagination: Search endpoints use request-body nextToken plus limit and return supplementalData.nextToken/isMore/perPage. Org contacts/companies use page and limit query parameters with a documented max limit of 500 on contacts.
notes: Published: official REST docs, OpenAPI, llms.txt, MCP docs, MCP OpenAPI, auth, pagination, rate limits, objects, and risk tiers are public and agent-retrievable.
MCP has read/write/destructive tiers; require human confirmation for send, create/update, and delete tools.
Public API and MCP menus are account/feature gated even though docs are public.
